text:
(a) State Highway Loop 480 in Maverick County is designated as Loop JUNO.

(b) Subject to Section 225.021 (General Provisions) (c), the department shall:

(1) design and construct markers indicating the designation as Loop JUNO and any other appropriate information; and

(2) erect a marker at each end of the loop and at appropriate intermediate sites along the loop.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 225.152 (Trooper Tom Nipper Memorial Highway) by Acts 2021, 87th Leg., R.S., Ch. 915 (H.B. 3607 ), Sec. 21.001(103), eff. September 1, 2021.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 225. State Highway Names
##### § 225.188 — Loop Juno

(a) State Highway Loop 480 in Maverick County is designated as Loop JUNO.

(b) Subject to Section 225.021 (General Provisions) (c), the department shall:

    (1) design and construct markers indicating the designation as Loop JUNO and any other appropriate information; and

    (2) erect a marker at each end of the loop and at appropriate intermediate sites along the loop.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 225.152 (Trooper Tom Nipper Memorial Highway) by Acts 2021, 87th Leg., R.S., Ch. 915 (H.B. 3607 ), Sec. 21.001(103), eff. September 1, 2021.

*Added by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 920 (H.B.4211), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2019.*

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 225.152 (Trooper Tom Nipper Memorial Highway) by Acts 2021, 87th Leg., R.S., Ch. 915 (H.B. 3607 ), Sec. 21.001(103), eff. September 1, 2021.
